headline: Seagate’s New AI Storage Suite Meets Rapidly Rising STX Valuation
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) has launched new high capacity consumer and professional storage solutions that support AI driven workflows. The update spans the Seagate, FireCuda, and LaCie brands, adding features such as bus powered desktop drives, Thunderbolt 5 support, and configurations up to 256TB. The products are aimed at content creators, gamers, and AI developers working with AI powered content creation and ultra high resolution media. For investors watching...
